description: High‑level charter for the Danish digital identity platform‑neutrality initiative, outlining scope, objectives, governance, risk overview, and stakeholder structure. Intended for project sponsors, senior stakeholders, and the governing board.
steps_to_create: Collect sponsor and executive approvals on project vision and objectives.
Define project scope, deliverables, and success criteria.
Identify key stakeholders and governance structure.
Outline high‑level budget, schedule, and risk overview.
Document project constraints, assumptions, and approval authorities.

description: Strategic framework detailing the technical feasibility of platform‑neutral authentication, including demonstrator architecture, technology selection, security requirements, and success metrics. Intended for the Technical Lead, Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator, and senior technical stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Review current technical options (FIDO2, GrapheneOS, browser fallback).
Define success metrics and acceptance criteria for demonstrators.
Outline resource requirements, timeline, and risk mitigation.
Prepare a high‑level technical architecture diagram.
Obtain review and sign‑off from the Technical Lead and Project Manager.

description: Strategic plan for framing and messaging to influence Digitaliseringsstyrelsen and other authorities, including policy proposals, communication tactics, and stakeholder engagement. Intended for the Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator, Legal Counsel, and senior policy stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Analyze the current policy landscape and identify key leverage points.
Develop framing narratives (resilience, continuity, privacy).
Draft policy proposals and procurement language.
Create a stakeholder engagement and communication plan.
Submit draft to Legal Counsel for compliance review and sign‑off.
approval_authorities: Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator, Legal Counsel

description: Plan to build and sustain a broad coalition of civil society, privacy advocates, researchers, and policymakers. Includes stakeholder mapping, engagement tactics, and metrics for coalition health. Intended for the Coalition Coordinator, Project Manager, and senior stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Identify potential coalition partners and map their interests.
Develop engagement tactics (meetings, workshops, joint statements).
Define coalition governance and decision‑making processes.
Set measurable metrics (membership size, diversity, engagement frequency).
Obtain sign‑off from the Coalition Coordinator and Project Manager.

description: Strategic plan to shape AltID procurement documents to include platform‑neutral and fallback authentication requirements. Covers procurement analysis, language drafting, stakeholder alignment, and legal review. Intended for the Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator, Legal Counsel, and procurement experts.
steps_to_create: Map the AltID procurement process and key decision points.
Draft procurement language for platform neutrality and fallback paths.
Align with legal requirements and procurement regulations.
Coordinate with stakeholders for endorsement.
Submit draft for Legal Counsel review and final approval.
approval_authorities: Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator, Legal Counsel

description: Plan to engage EU bodies (eIDAS, ETSI, Digital Identity Wallet WG) to influence standards that support platform neutrality and certified fallback mechanisms. Includes target bodies, engagement tactics, technical briefs, and monitoring plan. Intended for the Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator, Technical Lead, and senior stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Identify relevant EU standardization bodies and working groups.
Develop technical briefs and policy position papers.
Schedule meetings and participation in WG sessions.
Monitor progress and update engagement plan.
Obtain sign‑off from the Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator and Technical Lead.
approval_authorities: Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator, Technical Lead

description: Comprehensive baseline assessment of Denmark's current digital identity landscape, platform dependency metrics, user demographics, vendor market share, and regulatory environment. Provides the data foundation for all strategy documents.
steps_to_create: Collect and consolidate all relevant datasets (usage stats, legislation, procurement documents).
Analyze platform dependency and vendor concentration metrics.
Map current regulatory and procurement frameworks.
Draft findings, insights, and baseline metrics.
Review with Technical Lead and Project Manager for accuracy.

description: Consolidated project management framework that includes the risk register, communication plan, stakeholder engagement plan, change management plan, high‑level budget, schedule, and M&E framework. Serves as the operational backbone for the initiative.
steps_to_create: Compile risk register with identified risks and mitigation actions.
Develop communication and stakeholder engagement plans.
Outline change management processes and governance.
Populate high‑level budget, schedule, and M&E metrics.
Validate framework with senior stakeholders and obtain sign‑off.
